pokemon:tapu-koko.name: Tapu Koko
pokemon:tapu-koko.summary: It confuses its enemies by flying too quickly for the eye to follow. It has a hair-trigger temper but forgets what made it angry an instant later.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It confuses its enemies by flying too quickly for the eye to follow. It has a hair-trigger temper but forgets what made it angry an instant later.
This guardian deity of Melemele is brimming with curiosity. It summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning inside its body.
The lightning-wielding guardian deity of Melemele, Tapu Koko is brimming with curiosity and appears before people from time to time.
Although it’s called a guardian deity, if a person or Pokémon puts it in a bad mood, it will become a malevolent deity and attack.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It confuses its enemies by flying too quickly for the eye to follow. It has a hair-trigger temper but forgets what made it angry an instant later.

form:tapu-koko.name: Tapu Koko
form:tapu-koko.summary: Tapu Koko form with Electric / Fairy typing.
